Simple Process
Build Your CV in 3 Steps

No design skills needed. No confusing menus. Just your career story, beautifully formatted.

1
🎨
Choose a Template

Browse 15 professionally designed templates — from clean minimal to bold executive. Pick the one that fits your industry and style.

2
✍️
Fill Your Details

Add your experience, education, skills, and certifications. Our AI assistant (Upcoming) will help you write compelling bullet points that get noticed.

3
⬇️
Download PDF

Export a pixel-perfect, ATS-optimised PDF resume in seconds. Share it online or send it directly to recruiters.

ATS Score Feature
Beat the Bots. Impress the Humans.

75% of resumes are rejected by ATS software before a human reads them. Our built-in ATS checker ensures yours makes it through.

Got Questions?
Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about building your resume for free.

Yes — 100% free, forever. Every feature on PureFreeCV is included at zero cost: all 15 professional templates, real-time preview, custom accent colours, ATS Score Checker, PDF export, and the Job Application Tracker. No credit card, no hidden fees, no paid tiers.
Every template is built with clean, semantic HTML that Applicant Tracking Systems can parse without errors. We avoid multi-column layouts, tables, headers/footers, and graphics in the text layer — the same pitfalls that cause ATS rejection. Our built-in ATS Score Checker analyses your resume in real-time and tells you exactly what to fix before you apply.
The ATS Score Checker scans your resume content in real-time and scores it across key dimensions: keyword density, section completeness, formatting safety, and contact-info clarity. You get a score out of 100 with colour-coded suggestions so you can improve your resume instantly — no waiting, no upload required.
PureFreeCV offers 15 professionally designed resume templates — including Classic, Modern, Executive, Minimal, Creative, Tech, and more. Every template is fully customisable: swap accent colours, fonts, and sections without any design experience. All 15 are free with no upgrade required.
It depends on your field. For corporate roles (finance, law, consulting) the Classic or Executive templates convey authority. For tech and engineering, the Tech or Minimal templates signal clarity. Creative industries benefit from the Creative or Bold templates. All templates remain ATS-safe regardless of their visual style — so you never have to trade looks for parseability.
Absolutely. PureFreeCV is one of the best free resume builders for freshers. Our templates include dedicated sections for Education, Projects, Internships, Certifications, and Skills — so you can build a strong resume even with zero full-time experience. The AI writing assistant (Upcoming) also suggests achievement-focused bullet points tailored to entry-level roles.
For freshers, we recommend: Contact Information, Professional Summary (2–3 lines), Education (most recent first), Skills, Projects or Final Year Thesis, Internships or Part-Time Experience, Certifications, and Extra-Curricular Activities. PureFreeCV's templates pre-structure all of these so you just fill in the blanks.
Click the "Download PDF" button in the toolbar above the resume preview. Your resume is rendered at full A4 resolution using html2canvas and jsPDF, producing a print-ready, pixel-perfect PDF that looks identical on screen and paper. The download is instant and completely free — no account sign-up needed.
Yes. PureFreeCV uses pixel-accurate rendering so the exported PDF matches the on-screen preview exactly — including fonts, colours, spacing, and layout. We export at 2× resolution for sharp text on high-DPI screens and when printed. No formatting shifts, no missing elements.
Yes. PureFreeCV includes a free Cover Letter builder that matches your chosen resume template so your application looks cohesive. Use the AI writing assistant (Upcoming) to generate a personalised cover letter from your resume data — just enter the job title and company name and it drafts a tailored letter you can edit and export as PDF.
The built-in Job Application Tracker lets you log every application with company name, job title, date applied, location, job listing URL, notes, and status. Track applications through five stages: Saved → Applied → Interview → Offer → Rejected. A dashboard shows your overall success rate and stage breakdown at a glance. All data is stored locally in your browser — no account needed.
The Job Application Tracker is completely free and requires no sign-up or account. Your data is saved in your browser's local storage, so it persists between sessions on the same device without ever leaving your machine. To access it on multiple devices, use the Export feature to back up your data as a JSON file.
Yes. The AI writing assistant (Upcoming) includes role-specific content suggestions for over 200 job titles — from Software Engineer and Data Analyst to Nurse, Teacher, Marketing Manager, and Accountant. Each suggestion provides ready-to-use bullet points written in strong action-verb format so you can see exactly how a great resume for your target role should read.
Yes. PureFreeCV is fully responsive and works on any smartphone or tablet. The editor adapts to smaller screens with a mobile-optimised layout, swipeable template carousel, and touch-friendly inputs. You can build, edit, and download your resume entirely from your phone — no app download or installation required.
Your privacy is a priority. All resume data is stored locally in your browser — it never leaves your device and is never sent to our servers unless you explicitly use the "Share Online" feature. We do not sell, share, or process your personal data. No account is required, so there is nothing to breach.
No account is needed. Open the site, start building, and download your PDF — all without registering or providing an email address. Your resume data is auto-saved in your browser so it is there when you return. Creating an optional account unlocks cross-device sync and cloud backup, but it is never required.
Everything is free: 15 professional resume templates, custom accent colours, real-time live preview, ATS Score Checker, AI writing assistant (Upcoming), Cover Letter builder, shareable online resume link, PDF export, and the Job Application Tracker with success-rate analytics. There are no paid plans and no feature locked behind a paywall.
Most users complete a polished, ATS-ready resume in under 10 minutes. The guided form fills in sections step by step, the AI assistant (Upcoming) generates bullet points on demand, and the live preview updates instantly so you spend zero time on formatting. Just fill in your details, pick a template, and download your PDF.
Free Forever · No Credit Card Needed

🔒
Privacy Policy
Last updated: January 2026

1. Information We Collect

We collect information you voluntarily provide when using Free Professional CV Maker, including your name, email address, and CV data (work history, education, skills). We do not collect sensitive personal data beyond what is needed to provide our service.

We may also automatically collect limited technical data such as browser type, device type, and usage patterns to improve the service.

2. How We Use Your Information

Your data is used solely to:

  • Provide and improve the CV builder service
  • Send account-related emails (if you register)
  • Respond to your support requests

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

3. CV Data Storage

Your CV content is stored locally in your browser by default. If you create an account, your CVs may be saved to our secure servers to enable access across devices. You can delete your data at any time from your account settings or by contacting us.

4. AI Feature Data

When you use our AI writing assistant (Upcoming), your prompt text is sent to an AI API provider to generate content. This data is processed in accordance with that provider's privacy policy and is not stored by us beyond the duration of your session.

5. Cookies

We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies. You can disable cookies in your browser, but this may affect functionality.

6. Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures including HTTPS encryption for all data transfers. However, no online service can guarantee 100% security, and you use this service at your own risk.

7. Third-Party Services

8. Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at krishnaut@purefreecv.online.

9. Children's Privacy

This service is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children under 13 years of age.

10. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify registered users of significant changes by email. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance.

11. Contact

For any privacy-related questions or requests, contact: krishnaut@purefreecv.online

📋
Terms & Conditions
Last updated: January 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using Free Professional CV Maker ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.

2. Description of Service

Free Professional CV Maker provides an online tool to create professional CVs and resumes. All features, including the AI writing assistant (Upcoming) and all templates, are available for free to all users.

3. User Accounts

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to provide accurate information during registration and to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

4. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Use the Service for any unlawful purpose
  • Submit false, misleading, or fraudulent information
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Service
  • Reverse-engineer, copy, or redistribute the Service without permission
  • Use the AI features to generate harmful, offensive, or illegal content

5. Intellectual Property

The CV content you create is yours. The Service's design, templates, code, and branding remain the intellectual property of Free Professional CV Maker / Abhishek Krishnaut. You may not copy or resell the templates or platform.

6. Free Service

Free Professional CV Maker is currently provided free of charge. We do not require any payment information or subscriptions to access any part of our service.

7. AI Features Disclaimer

AI-generated content is provided as a writing aid only. You are solely responsible for reviewing, editing, and ensuring the accuracy of any AI-generated content in your CV. We make no warranty that AI-generated content is accurate, complete, or appropriate for your specific needs.

8. Disclaimer of Warranties

The Service is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. We do not guarantee that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or that CVs created will result in employment. We are not responsible for decisions made by employers or recruiters.

9. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Free Professional CV Maker shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service.

10. Termination

We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your account at our sole discretion for violations of these Terms, without notice.

11. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts in India.

12. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

13. Contact

For questions about these Terms, contact: krishnaut@purefreecv.online

⚙️
AI Settings
Configure your Anthropic API key to enable AI features on your own deployment.
Your key is stored only in your browser (localStorage) and never sent to our servers. Get your key at console.anthropic.com. Note: for a production site, use a server-side proxy instead.
💡 For Site Owners: The best way to offer AI to users without them needing an API key is to add a simple server-side proxy that injects your key. Contact krishnaut@purefreecv.online for integration help.
